payload.label: cabinet
payload.long_description: Partial vertical crop of a tall dark-brown wooden cabinet door with a recessed rectangular panel and visible right-side frame; surface shows matte wood grain and slight wear/chipping at the top edge; estimated distance ≈1.0 m from camera.
